title: Evolver Session Lifecycle
description: Evolver adapter activities across session start, signal detection (file edit), and session end transitions. Three standalone Node.js scripts act as hooks: session-start injects evolution memory context; signal-detect monitors file edits for signals; session-end records outcomes.
session_start_flow: START: Hook triggered on session begin (stdin JSON context)
findEvolverRoot() → check EVOLVER_ROOT env, then ../../../package.json, then ~/skills/evolver
YES → findMemoryGraph(evolverRoot) → check MEMORY_GRAPH_PATH env, then memory/evolution/memory_graph.jsonl
YES → readLastN(graphPath, 5) → parse last 5 JSONL lines
NO → count successCount, failCount from outcome.status
formatOutcome(entry) for each entry → [icon] date score=N signals=[...] note
Build summary: 'Evolution Memory: recent N outcomes (S success, F failed): ...'
output JSON { agent_message: summary, additionalContext: summary } → END
signal_detect_flow: START: Hook triggered on file edit/save event (stdin JSON: {content|file_content|diff, path|file_path})
Extract content field and filePath from input
detectSignals(content): iterate SIGNAL_KEYWORDS map, keyword substring match (lowercase)
NO → build ctx string: '[Evolution Signal] Detected: [signals] in filePath'
output JSON { additional_context: ctx, additionalContext: ctx } → END
session_end_flow: START: Hook triggered on session end (stdin JSON)
getGitDiffStats(): execSync 'git diff --stat HEAD~1' + 'git diff HEAD~1 --no-color' (5s timeout each)
YES → detectSignals(diffInfo.diffSnippet) → keyword match against 7 signal types
Build outcome: { geneId='ad_hoc', signals, status, score, summary }
recordToHub(outcome): POST JSON to $EVOMAP_HUB_URL/a2a/evolution/record via curl (8s timeout)
NO  → recordToLocal(graphPath, outcome): appendFileSync to memory_graph.jsonl
Build msg: '[Evolution] Session outcome recorded to {target}: {summary}'
output JSON { followup_message: msg, stopMessage: msg, additionalContext: msg } → END
signal_types: user_feature_request: add feature/implement/new function/new module/please add
recurring_error: same error/still failing/not fixed/keeps failing/repeatedly
stable_success_plateau: injected when no other signals detected at session end

key_data_structures.memory_graph_entry: { timestamp, gene_id, signals[], outcome: { status, score, note }, source }

env_vars: EVOMAP_HUB_URL / A2A_HUB_URL: Hub API base URL for remote recording
EVOMAP_API_KEY / A2A_NODE_SECRET: Bearer token for Hub API
EVOMAP_NODE_ID / A2A_NODE_ID: sender identity for Hub payloads
key_decisions: Memory graph path: env > memory/evolution/ > MEMORY/ variant
Hub vs local fallback: Hub tried first; local JSONL on failure
No-op guard: all three scripts output {} and exit early if preconditions unmet
important_notes: All three scripts are standalone hook scripts invoked by the Claude Code harness. session-start is synchronous; signal-detect and session-end use async stdin reading. Hub recording uses curl via execSync (not native HTTP). memory_graph.jsonl is append-only JSONL. gene_id is always 'ad_hoc' for ad-hoc sessions.
